product_results.title: JETech Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch, Non-Yellowing Shockproof Phone Bumper Cover, Anti-Scratch Clear Back (Natural Titanium)

summary.text: The cellular phone case receives praise for its excellent quality and perfect fit. Customers appreciate that it protects well and features anti-scratch material. However, some users report discoloration issues, noting that the case already looks yellow and turns yellow within eight months. Opinions on durability vary among customers.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Case for iPhone 16 Pro
authors_reviews.text: The JETech case is exactly what I needed for my iPhone 16 Pro. The clear back showcases the phone beautifully without yellowing over time. The case is lightweight but offers excellent shockproof protection, and the anti-scratch material keeps it looking brand new.It fits the phone perfectly, with precise cutouts for buttons and ports. The raised edges around the camera and screen add an extra layer of protection. Overall, this is a fantastic case—affordable, durable, and stylish. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Het

authors_reviews.title: Perfect cases.
authors_reviews.text: Perfect cases. It’s a very good brand.
authors_reviews.author: Douglas B.

authors_reviews.title: Bonne protection mais jaunit assez vite
authors_reviews.text: La coque est assez épaisse et protège vraiment bien le téléphone, elle absorbe bien les chocs et donne une bonne prise en main. On sent que l’appareil est sécurisé.Par contre, elle a malheureusement changé de couleur assez rapidement, ce qui enlève un peu l’aspect neuf et esthétique du téléphone. Si la durabilité au niveau de la transparence était meilleure, ce serait parfait.Bonne protection tout de même, mais à garder en tête si vous voulez qu’elle reste parfaitement claire longtemps.
authors_reviews.author: Mélissa Lambert

authors_reviews.title: Drop tested
authors_reviews.text: BEAUTIFUL CASE AND EXTREME DROP TESTED BY ME - fell from the third floor all the way to the ground and my iphone 16 pro is fine but the case it was in suffered some dings. However i replaced it with the exact same one ! Love this clear case with no magsafe bs !
authors_reviews.author: Mathew Hacker

authors_reviews.title: Cheap price, but good quality!
authors_reviews.text: I'm literally shocked at how well this super cheap case has held up for my new phone. My spouse bought a $40 case at the phone store. I ordered this. They look exactly the same, no yellowing, and way cheaper! I've also dropped my phone a few too many times and it has protected it. VERY happy!
authors_reviews.author: TG
